channel.title: YOLO26 on yexca'Blog
channel.description: Recent content in YOLO26 on yexca'Blog

item.title: Object Detection with YOLO26
item.description: 📢 This article was translated by gemini-3-flash-preview Installation and Environment Creation Official installation reference: Installing conda - conda documentation Download link: Download anaconda You can download Miniconda and set up environments manually as needed. Create a running environment: 1 conda create -n env_name python=3.13 -y Activate the environment: 1 conda activate env_name Installing PyTorch For the CPU version, use this command directly: 1 pip install torch …
